arts.ttl: What David Moyes thought of new Everton Stadium as honest verdict shared after first visit
arts.sum: David Moyes has been speaking about his long-awaited first visit to the new Everton Stadium

arts.ttl: Man City star Erling Haaland becomes transfer MVP with €200m valuation
arts.sum: Erling Braut Haaland is the most valuable player in world football, with his Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) approaching €200 million. The 24-year-old Manchester City striker currently has an ETV of €199.6 million, which puts him just €400,000 away from the magic €200 million mark.

arts.ttl: Goalkeeper performance against Manchester City ‘didn’t go unnoticed’ – Player eyed as Ederson replacement
arts.sum: Ederson’s contract at the Etihad Stadium runs out in the summer of 2026. A renewal isn’t quite on the horizon for the Brazilian and the Citizens now seem to be preparing for life without him. TuttoSport today have reported that Manchester City see Juventus’ Michele di Gregorio as a replacement for Ederson, who they expect The post Goalkeeper performance against Manchester City ‘didn’t go unnoticed’ – Player eyed as Ederson replacement appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Liverpool and Man City to battle for Simons transfer
arts.sum: Xavi Simons is set to leave Leipzig this summer, with Premier League sides such as Manchester United, Manchester City and Liverpool interested in a deal, The Transfers Podcast understands. Leipzig are willing to cash in on Simons for the right price and the Dutch wonderkid has emerged as a candidate to replace Kevin de Bruyne at Man City, while Duncan Castles revealed that Bayern Munich are also in the mix.

arts.ttl: Official’s comments on Manchester City man indicate player will ‘have to move’
arts.sum: Issa Kaboré hasn’t made an appearance yet for Manchester City since joining them from KV Mechelen in 2020. The Premier League club have sent him out on loan since then and last summer they let him join Benfica. The wing-back struggled for regular minutes with the Lisbon club and his temporary stay was cut short The post Official’s comments on Manchester City man indicate player will ‘have to move’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi's Inter Miami face Kevin De Bruyne challenge despite 'agreement'
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is on the lookout for a new club this summer and MLS side Inter Miami have emerged as favourites to add them to their superstar roster - but David Beckham's club could have a few problems in their bid to sign him

arts.ttl: Tottenham send Man City warning over Destiny Udogie transfer interest
arts.sum: Tottenham take a strong stance on selling left-back Destiny Udogie to Man City.

arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz Man City transfer 'very tempting' amid secret negotiations
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City transfer news amid fresh reports about what appears to be a three-way race for Florian Wirtz, alongside Bayern Munich and Real Madrid

arts.sum: As City push for a top-five finish, will Everton prove a worthy roadblock?
